hypothesis: First composite structural portrait will reveal scale-free graph, steep pyramid, meta-heavy theme distribution, and high data:knowledge compression
method: Full-repo structural census: file counts, citation graph analysis, knowledge hierarchy measurement, theme distribution, lane metabolism, temporal patterns

knowledge_hierarchy.finding: Hierarchy is catalogued but weakly wired. Cross-layer edges are sparse — lessons reference principles at 0.58/lesson, beliefs at 0.001/lesson. Philosophy claims reference 0 beliefs. The pyramid is steep but structurally disconnected between layers.

theme_distribution.note: Theme counts sum to 2.23x lesson count — lessons appear in multiple themes or counts have drifted

compression_ratios.experiment_to_lesson_note: 252K experiment lines produce 15.8K lesson lines = 94% compression
compression_ratios.note: 421K total lines contain 15.8K lines of distilled knowledge = 96.2% scaffolding

temporal_shape.note: S186 was the domain-explosion session — 36 domains bootstrapped in one burst

structural_findings: CONFIRMED: Scale-free citation graph with power-law degree distribution and mega-hub (L-601, 55 citations)
CONFIRMED: Single giant component (99.4%) — knowledge is one connected mass, not fragmented
NEW: Cross-layer wiring is surprisingly WEAK — 0.58 P-refs/lesson, 0.001 B-refs/lesson, 0 PHIL→B edges
CONFIRMED: Meta self-referential density 42.5% of theme assignments
NEW: Theme counts sum to 2.23x lesson count — structural bookkeeping has drifted
NEW: 27.2% of lessons have zero in-citations — unintegrated knowledge mass
NEW: Lane metabolism shows 65.1% merge rate with S186 as single explosion event (317 of 935 total lanes)
MIXED: Clustering coefficient 0.16 — moderate local structure, consistent with scale-free networks

diff_vs_expectation.scale_free_graph: CONFIRMED — power-law tail, Gini 0.603, hub dominance
diff_vs_expectation.steep_pyramid_weak_wiring: CONFIRMED AND WORSE THAN EXPECTED — L→B connectivity essentially zero (1 edge total)
